The function should check if all the notes in the given list fall within the specified vocal range. It will convert each note to its corresponding pitch in a standardized format, such as MIDI or a frequency, and then compare it to the lower and upper bounds. If all notes are within the range, the function returns `True`, otherwise `False`.
